calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Agent-seed sweep diagnostic (monostrategy basin size in agent-init space)
items.note: Diagnostic sampling 30 agent_seeds at fixed env_seed=42 to characterise the monostrategy basin in agent-init space. Builds on V3-EXQ-555 finding (agent_seed=7 entropy ~ 0.68 vs agent_seed=42 entropy=0). Reuses V3-EXQ-555 _make_agent_and_env factored-seed helper; replicates ARM_NORMAL config verbatim (P0=40, P1=60, 200 steps/ep). 4-row interpretation grid: R1 deep_collapse_basin / R2 bimodal_split / R3 mostly_diverse / R4 continuous_spread. Seeds include 7/42/17 V3-EXQ-552/555 anchors plus spread of magnitudes. claim_ids=[] (no substrate claim under test). experiment_purpose=diagnostic.

items.title: Module-init swap diagnostic (localises which submodule's seed-7 init enables V3-EXQ-555 C0/C2 escape from monostrategy)
items.note: Diagnostic follow-up to V3-EXQ-555 (env vs agent factorization) which found agent-side seed=7 init enables diverse policies (C0=0.679, C2=0.690) while env_seed is irrelevant (C1=0.000, C3=0.000). V3-EXQ-556 drills one level deeper: which SPECIFIC submodule's weight init is responsible? Eight arms at env_seed=42 fixed: ARM_BASELINE_42 (all modules seed=42), ARM_BASELINE_7 (all seed=7), and six single-module swaps (latent_stack / e1 / e2 / residue / e3 / hippocampal) each at seed=7 with others at seed=42. Per-module seed override implemented via class-level __init__ monkey-patch that calls torch.manual_seed before each submodule's original __init__, then restored after REEAgent construction. Smoke 2026-05-12T06:34Z PASS: per-module first-informative-param checksum table shows BASELINE_42 vs BASELINE_7 differ on every module (latent -8.16 vs -2.38; e1 -0.023 vs 0.388; e2 -6.32 vs 9.15; residue 0.898 vs 1.163; e3 0.898 vs 1.163; hippocampal -6.32 vs 9.15); SWAP_E1.e1 == BASELINE_7.e1 (0.388); SWAP_E1.<every-other-module> == BASELINE_42.<that-module>; 1-ep boot loop completes (BASELINE_42 P1 action_counts={2:20}, replicating monostrategy at smoke scale). Pre-registered 6-row interpretation grid in script docstring + manifest evidence_direction_note: R1 single_module_sufficient (ONE swap >= 0.30 -> that module's init drives diversity) / R2 multi_module_conjunctive (NO single-swap lifts AND BASELINE_7 ~0.68 -> route to pair-swap V3-EXQ-558 candidate) / R3 latent_stack_only / R4 e3_only / R5 hippocampal_only / R6 replication_failure (BASELINE_7 NOT in [0.58,0.78] -> patch disturbs baseline; debug before drawing conclusions). P0=40, P1=60, 200 steps/ep matches V3-EXQ-555 / V3-EXQ-552 ARM_NORMAL verbatim. Single seed-pair per cell -- the seed pair IS the variable. evidence_direction set non_contributory on PASS so governance does not weight any claim. experiment_purpose=diagnostic; claim_ids=[].
